title: Natural Dried Pampas Grass (UK Company), 65PCS Dried Flowers Fluffy Pampas Grass Bouquet, Artificial Pampas for Wedding Floral Arrangements Boho Home Decor
features: Natural Beauty: This pampas grass bouquet comprising 65 stems, is meticulously using a combination of natural pampas grass, white pampas grass, fluffy pampas grass, reed grass, millet grass and etc. It showcases the natural beauty of these elements, bringing a touch of wilderness and elegance to any space.

Fluffy Pampas Grass: Drawing inspiration from the captivating landscapes of the UK, this bouquet captures the essence of the British countryside. The blend of natural pampas grass creates a unique and enchanting arrangement. You can create stunning floral arrangements that match your style.

Versatile Home Decor: Whether it's a cozy living room/bedroom, a charming wedding venue, or an elegant office space, these dried pampas grass adds warmth and elegance to various occasions. It complements both contemporary and traditional settings, making it perfect for celebrations, home décor, or gifting options.

Low-maintenance decor: If you prefer hassle-free and low-maintenance decor, our dried pampas grass bouquet is an ideal choice for you. Unlike fresh flowers that require regular watering, and trimming, our pampas grass is easy to plume. It allows you to enjoy the beauty of nature without too much time and effort.
What You'll Get: You'll receive a total of 65 pieces of mixed natural dried pampas grass in a total length of 17.7 inches, which you can easily cut into suitable lengths for your vase.
description: How to Fluff Pampas Grass-/br When your pampas grass arrives, it is normal that they look a little compact. Our suggestion is to take the stems out of the packaging and shake the pampas grass outside to fluff it up, it will shed a little but it's totally normal. Allow a few days for the plumes to take shape once placed in your décor arrangement. For optimal fluff, we recommend gently blowing dry your pampas grass gently on a low heat setting for a few minutes. Be careful not to over-blow dry or brush them out as the grasses will shed too much.
